'''Gliders''' were avians found on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]; they lived in large flocks.

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] fed these creatures crumbs of [[breadstick]]s in [[Keben Park]] while he was planning to assassinate [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]''
*[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines'' abridged audiobook]]
